commit.message:
Fix chat link matching: strip trailing punctuation, add substring fallback

LLMs commonly add trailing colons/dashes inside <b> tags and use slight
name variations. Strip trailing punctuation before lookup and fall back to
longest-key-first substring matching (min 4 chars) to catch more names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: pre-launch hardening — 10 issues across API, web, mobile

Second pass of production-readiness fixes found during full codebase audit.

**Database (schema.ts):**
- Add 12 missing indexes on hot query columns (characters.wallet_address,
  weekly_runs(wallet,week_start), boss_participants.boss_id,
  active_missions.character_id, leaderboard(week,score), etc.)
  Prevents full table scans under load.

**API security & reliability (index.ts, auth.ts, auth-service.ts):**
- Add request ID middleware (x-request-id header) for log tracing
- Deep health check: /health now probes DB (SELECT 1), returns 503 if degraded
- Validate Solana wallet address format (base58, 32-44 chars) in auth middleware
- Replace static JWT_SECRET dev fallback with dynamic per-process value

**Boss spawn race condition (boss-service.ts):**
- getOrSpawnBoss() now uses INSERT OR IGNORE (week_start has UNIQUE constraint)
  so concurrent requests can't create duplicate bosses

**Silent error swallowing (boss/mission/run/raid services + routes):**
- Replace all .catch(() => {}) and catch {} with .catch(e => console.error(...))
  across 15+ call sites (ER ops, achievement checks, lifetime stats, challenge
  progress). Errors are now visible in logs instead of silently disappearing.

**Hardcoded devnet URLs → env vars (web + mobile):**
- Explorer cluster suffix reads from VITE_SOLANA_CLUSTER / EXPO_PUBLIC_SOLANA_CLUSTER
  (auto-hides ?cluster= param on mainnet-beta)
- VRF program IDs configurable via VITE_VRF_* / EXPO_PUBLIC_VRF_* env vars
  with devnet defaults — no code change needed for mainnet deploy, just set env

**Mobile production cleanup (_layout.tsx, app.json):**
- Wrap 5x console.log in __DEV__ guard (was firing on every render in prod)
- Bump Android minSdkVersion 26 → 28 (Android 9+, drops <1% of devices)

commit.message:
Replace native date inputs with shadcn date picker on timeline

Install shadcn Calendar component (react-day-picker) and create a
reusable DatePicker component with popover. Replace all 4 native
<input type="date"> fields in the Add Event and Edit Entry dialogs
with the new picker. Also fix color picker rings to use theme vars.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: sync rows Map on rescan — remove candidates no longer in diskFiles

The rows useEffect was append-only: it never removed entries already in the
Map. After a rescan that pruned stale #recycle candidates from the DB, the
modal still showed those rows because they were already in local state.

Now the effect rebuilds the Map from the current diskFiles list, keeping
imported rows (so "✓ Imported" remains visible) and preserving existing
match/selected state for rows still present, while dropping any that were
pruned.

commit.message:
Switch wheel-base to 3D turntable perspective animation

Replace flat 2D wheelSpin with wheelTurntable keyframe that uses
perspective(300px) rotateX(70deg) rotateZ(360deg) — tilts the disc
so it appears to lie flat on a surface and spins like a real pottery
wheel viewed from slightly above. animationFillMode: both ensures
the disc shows at its tilted resting angle even when paused.

fix: add purl=FALSE to all chunk headers in full_workflow vignette

Global opts_chunk$set(purl=FALSE) is not respected during R CMD check's
tangle step because knitr::purl() does not evaluate R expressions in
setup chunks. Adding purl=FALSE as a static chunk-header option on each
chunk prevents code extraction and fixes the CI vignette build error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(api): support KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD env var fallback (#1444)

## Summary
- The K8s secret `stoa-control-plane-api-secrets` provides
`KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD` but the code reads
`KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_CLIENT_SECRET`
- This name mismatch causes `KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_CLIENT_SECRET` to stay empty
→ Keycloak admin connection fails → portal app creation works but
returns no OAuth credentials
- Fix: `os.getenv` fallback chain reads `KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_CLIENT_SECRET`
first, falls back to `KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD`

## Root cause
K8s secret key name doesn't match the Pydantic field name. Rather than
requiring an infra change (renaming the secret key), this fix accepts
both names.

## Test plan
- [x] `ruff check` passes
- [x] `black --check` passes
- [x] Pre-commit hooks pass
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] Verify on staging: create portal app → should return client_id +
client_secret

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Strip non-embeddable iframes from feed story content

processing to only keep domains that allow cross-origin embedding
(YouTube, Vimeo, SoundCloud, Spotify, Bandcamp, Google).

commit.message:
fix: add cookies.txt support for transcript fetching

YouTube blocks datacenter proxy IPs for transcript requests.
Load Netscape-format cookies.txt into requests.Session and pass
as http_client to youtube-transcript-api. Falls back to proxy
if no cookies file exists.

Also add cookies.txt to .gitignore to prevent accidental commit.

commit.message:
feat: native provider classes with Gemini thought_signature fix

Add dedicated provider subclasses for all OpenAI-compatible providers,
replacing generic OpenAIProvider instantiation. GeminiProvider captures
and echoes extra_content.google.thought_signature to fix HTTP 400 errors
on function calling. Each provider implements real API-specific logic:

- GeminiProvider: thought_signature capture/echo in providerMetadata
- DeepSeekProvider: reasoning_content extraction, cache stats, reasoning stripping
- GroqProvider: x_groq request ID logging
- MistralProvider: safe_prompt in request body
- QwenProvider: result_format + enable_search for DashScope
- KimiProvider: multimodal capabilities, multi-endpoint support
- MiniMaxProvider: reasoning_details extraction
- Together/FireworksProvider: API total_tokens usage normalization

Also adds buildRequestBody() hook to OpenAIProvider for subclass
customization and providerMetadata field to ToolCall interface.

fix: address post-merge review findings for YAML quoting, tests, and workflows (#233)

- Quote all domain-rules entries in agents.yaml defensively to prevent
  silent YAML parsing breakage when colons are added to unquoted lines
- Add edge case tests for domain-rules validation: non-array values,
  null/undefined, empty arrays, empty/whitespace bracket IDs, multiple
  bracketed groups, and empty Bash() patterns
- Use matchAll for bracket regex in spec-validator to catch multiple
  bracketed groups in a single domain-rules entry
- Validate that Bash() patterns are non-empty in allowed-tools
- Deduplicate PM detection in coverage-report.yml into a shared step
- Fix Python shell interpolation to use os.environ in coverage-report.yml
- Normalize VERSION_FILES_CHANGED to version_changed in
  breaking-change-detection.yml for consistent casing

commit.message:
Fix ML Flex urgency: map "shipped" shipment status to "ready_to_ship"

Flex (self_service) orders in transit have shipment.status="shipped" but
the seller still needs to deliver to the customer. Storing status="shipped"
caused compute_urgency to return DELIVERED_TODAY, which has no visible card
in the dashboard. Remapping to "ready_to_ship" gives DUE_TODAY urgency,
appearing correctly in the "Entregar hoy" summary card.

_is_order_resolved still reads raw_data["shipment"]["status"] directly,
so Flex orders correctly wait for "delivered" before being archived.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  crash if non-Omaha variant name contains '8'
